reviews.comment:
La verdad que me salvaron salvaron! Me recargaron combustible, revisaron los fluidos del auto, me limpiaron los vidrios y todo impecable... Gracias AUTOMOVIL CLUB por tener todo de maravilla!🫂 Soy socio y lo recomiendo, haganlo si pueden porque que es un camino de ida!!

(Translated by Google)
They truly saved me! They refueled my car, checked the fluids, cleaned the windows, and everything was spotless... Thank you, AUTOMOVIL CLUB, for everything being so wonderful! 🫂 I'm a member and I highly recommend them; do it if you can because it's a one-way trip!!

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias!! Agradecemos tu visita Pablo.
